title: Graph MVP closeout fixes opened
body: Tidal Surfing Lighthouse opening owner-requested fix slice on connecting-oak-resources: correct graph topology ADR numbering collision, remove dead smoke:dev:stub gate references, clarify next-session thread wording/branch metadata, and then run docs/code/assumptions reviewers. Current graph topology ADR is ADR-173; earlier graph ADR-168 mentions are historical because ADR-168 belongs to the accepted TypeScript 6 migration ADR. Active claims were empty before opening; claim 918b1a01 registered. Note: claims open exhibited the known area-pattern last-write-wins shape, so the claim entry was immediately corrected to list the full edit area before touching planning/docs files.
